category_sources: source_facts.description says it bridges local AI coding agents to messaging platforms; official GitHub README describes bridging local AI coding agents to Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, and WeChat Work.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cc-connect; official GitHub repository and README use cc-connect.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README has a Documentation section linking the usage guide, INSTALL.md, and config example; docs/usage.zh-CN.md is the official usage guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/chenhg5/cc-connect, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess existing repository values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies local AI coding-agent bridging; official README lists supported messaging platforms and AI coding assistants.
